Projects

Projects We Execute

End-to-end project management connecting vendors to consumers seamlessly across India.

RenewableSubsidy

Solar Rooftop Installation

Complete solar panel installation for residential, commercial & industrial setups with net metering and subsidy assistance.

IndustrialCertified

LPG Pipeline Installation

Certified LPG pipeline laying for apartments, hotels, restaurants and industrial kitchens with full safety compliance.

Security24/7

CCTV Surveillance System

IP-based HD CCTV installation with remote monitoring, NVR/DVR setup and mobile app integration.

SafetyCompliance

Fire & Safety Systems

Fire alarm, sprinkler systems, fire extinguisher supply and complete safety audit for all building types.

IndustrialTurnkey

Industrial Electrical Projects

HT/LT panel installation, transformer setup, power distribution systems and complete industrial wiring.

CivilInfrastructure

Civil Infrastructure Projects

Construction, renovation, interior work, waterproofing, flooring and complete building project management.

ITNetworking

Network & IT Infrastructure

LAN/WAN setup, server installation, structured cabling, Wi-Fi deployment for offices and industries.

EnergyEV

EV Charging Station Setup

AC/DC EV charger installation for residential complexes, offices, malls and highways. Subsidy support included.

InfrastructureMunicipal

Water & Sewage Projects

Pipeline laying, STP setup, water treatment plants and industrial effluent treatment projects.

AMC

Annual Maintenance Contracts

Preventive maintenance plans that protect your assets and minimize downtime.

CCTV System AMC
Complete maintenance of IP cameras, DVR/NVR, cables and monitoring systems with quarterly visits.
  • 4 preventive visits/year
  • 24/7 support helpline
  • Priority emergency response
  • Parts replacement at cost
Solar System AMC
Panel cleaning, inverter health checks, wiring inspection and performance monitoring for solar systems.
  • 6 panel cleaning visits
  • Monthly performance report
  • Inverter health monitoring
  • Insurance claim support
Computer & IT AMC
Complete IT infrastructure maintenance including PCs, servers, networking hardware and software support.
  • On-site & remote support
  • Antivirus & OS updates
  • Data backup management
  • Hardware repair/replacement
Fire Safety AMC
Maintenance and testing of fire alarm panels, sprinklers, extinguishers and smoke detectors with certification.
  • Quarterly system testing
  • Compliance certification
  • Extinguisher refill/replace
  • NOC renewal support
Building & Facility AMC
Comprehensive facility maintenance including lifts, AC, electrical, plumbing, painting and civil works.
  • All trades covered
  • Dedicated site manager
  • Monthly audit reports
  • 2hr emergency response
Machinery & Generator AMC
Preventive maintenance, oil changes, load testing and emergency breakdown support for DG sets and industrial machines.
  • Quarterly load testing
  • Oil & filter replacement
  • Battery health check
  • 24/7 breakdown support

Our Work

Recent Portfolio & Completed Projects

A snapshot of real projects delivered across Tamil Nadu — from LPG pipeline networks to digital marketing and business services.

LPG Pipeline Network — Tamil Nadu
Designed & coordinated piped LPG connection projects across 19+ locations including Madurai, Trichy, Pondicherry, Tirunelveli, Coimbatore & Chennai — covering survey, line laying, fittings and safety compliance for residential complexes.
  • 19+ locations covered
  • ₹4 Lakh+ project value executed
  • End-to-end vendor coordination
CCTV Installation
Complete CCTV surveillance setup for residential properties in Othakadai (3 houses) and Teppakulam — including camera placement, DVR setup and mobile monitoring configuration.
AC & Bathroom Cleaning Services
10+ AC services and 10+ professional bathroom deep-cleaning services completed for homes across Madurai with trained technicians and quality checks.
Accounting, Taxation & Company Registration
Accounting & bookkeeping support delivered for 5+ clients, and complete company registration services completed for 10+ companies in Madurai — GST, compliance & filings handled end-to-end.
Digital Marketing — Solar & LPG Pipeline Brands
Ran complete digital marketing campaigns for an LPG gas pipeline installation company and a solar installation company — lead generation, social media and brand visibility across Tamil Nadu.
Printing, Signage & Equipment Services
5+ printing & signage projects completed including custom LED flex boards, plus servicing of cash counting machines for retail businesses in Madurai.
Our Roadmap

Starting in Madurai, Built for Tamil Nadu & India

We're a startup today — Phase 1 of our plan is to grow our vendor network across Tamil Nadu, then expand pan-India.

Meet The Founder

Visionary Leadership

Jeya Suriya Sundar Rajan

Founder & CEO, Theervu Maiyam

Many people possess valuable skills, businesses and ideas but often remain unnoticed, disconnected or unable to scale. The vision behind Theervu Maiyam is to identify opportunities, connect businesses with customers, vendors and partners, and help them reach their true potential.

Theervu Maiyam is more than a marketplace. It is a business ecosystem that connects buyers, sellers, manufacturers, contractors, professionals and service providers through one trusted platform.

Our mission is to solve real-world problems, create opportunities, build business networks and enable sustainable growth for individuals, businesses and communities.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Quick answers about how Theervu Maiyam works. Still have a doubt? Ask our chat assistant in the corner — it can answer questions about our services, projects, AMC, products and more.

What is Theervu Maiyam?
Theervu Maiyam (தீர்வு மையம் — "Solution Center") is a Madurai-based business ecosystem platform that connects customers with verified vendors for products, projects, services and AMC across categories like solar, CCTV, fire safety, networking, construction, digital marketing and more.
How do I book a service or get a quote?
Click "Book a Service" or "Get Quote" on any section, fill in your requirement and contact details, and our team will connect you with a verified vendor and call you back within 2 hours.
How do I become a vendor on the platform?
Scroll to the "Register as Vendor" section and fill in your business details. It's just ₹1 for the first month, then ₹50/month renewal — no hidden fees. Our team will verify and onboard you within 24 hours.
What is an AMC and how does it work?
AMC (Annual Maintenance Contract) plans cover regular preventive maintenance for equipment like CCTV, fire safety, generators, solar, IT and building systems — helping you avoid breakdowns. Pick a plan and our team will share the rates and schedule for your site.
Where can I see product or service prices?
Prices aren't shown on the site since they change daily based on the vendor and material rates. Once you enquire via WhatsApp or Email, the relevant vendor shares current pricing directly with you.
Which areas do you currently serve?
We're a startup currently based in Madurai, Tamil Nadu. Phase 1 of our plan is to expand our verified vendor network across Tamil Nadu, followed by a pan-India expansion in Phase 2.
How can I contact Theervu Maiyam directly?
You can reach us on WhatsApp or call at +91 93625 79566, email theervumaiyam@gmail.com, or use the chat assistant and floating WhatsApp/Email buttons on this page.

Didn't find your answer? or message us on WhatsApp.
